==Trivia==
*In the comics, Mystique is a shapeshifting [[mutant]] who can perfectly mimic the appearance and voice of any person.

==Behind the Scenes==
*Mystique in the [[Marvel Cinematic Universe]] is the second live-action incarnation of the character, following an incarnation portrayed by [[Rebecca Romijn]] and {{WPS|Jennifer Lawrence}}.
**Back in 2022, Romijn had expressed interest in reprising her role as Mystique from the ''{{WPS|X-Men (film series)|X-Men}}'' film series for the [[Marvel Cinematic Universe]] in light of [[Patrick Stewart]] reprising his role as [[Professor X/Earth-838|Professor X]] in ''[[Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness]]''. She noted that while she didn't know if [[Marvel Studios]] would want her back, she would be interested because she enjoyed her time playing the role and the people she worked with.<ref>[https://comicbook.com/startrek/news/star-trek-strange-new-worlds-rebecca-romijn-xmen-mystique/ Star Trek: Strange New Worlds’ Rebecca Romijn on Giving Number One a Name and Possibility of Returning as X-Men’s Mystique]</ref>
